original_title: BKD-246 Mating Mother and play [Men's Mountain Road] Mai Kohinata - Hinata Komine
overview: Since my son lost his father when he was young, Mai has lived with him for a long time. My son, who was carefully raised, grew up quickly without a period of rebellion, graduated from university safely, and decided on a place to work. However, when I learned that I was assigned to Kansai, I was impatient. For Mai now, his son was more than his son. Mai invited her son to a hot spring trip to make the last memory of the two of them.
